title: Joint Review: Yvonne Jewkes and Helen Johnston. Prison Readings: A Critical Introduction to Prisons and Imprisonment Cullompton: Willan Publishing, 2006, £24.00 pbk (ISBN 1 84392 148 0), xi + 305 pp. Mary Corcoran. abstract: Book Review [Prison Readings: A Critical Introduction to Prisons and Imprisonment by Yvonne Jewkes and Helen Johnston (Cullampton: Willan Publishing, 2006) and.
